_note: l004: element-native one-way bindings resolve through the tag-bound element. `bind:clientWidth={s}` where s:string ← clientWidth (number) fires TS2322 at the bound expr; `bind:naturalWidth` on <div> (no such property) fires TS2339 at the directive name. Mirrors upstream's `EXPR = element.NAME` (Binding.ts:112-115).
